---
title: "Publications"
format: html
bibliography: ../resources/biblio/biblio_web.bib
nocite: |
  @*
---

Here is the complete list of our research publications:

::: {#refs style="max-height: 450px; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color); padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px;"}
:::
